title: rosmarinus officinalis var. rigidus
intro: Rosmarinus officinalis var. rigidus, commonly known as the upright rosemary or stiff-leaved rosemary, is a shrub-like evergreen plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is prized for its fragrant, needle-like leaves and blue flowers, which have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting digestion, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions such as arthritis and respiratory issues. Rosmarinus officinalis var. rigidus can be consumed as a tea, added to food or used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, capsules, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies.
